Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore

Interface LightElement

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, ILElement, LightObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
All Known Subinterfaces:
ImplicitElement, InternalElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
ImplicitElementImpl, InternalElementImpl, LightElementImpl
public interface LightElement extends LightObject, ILElement
A representation of the model object 'Light Element'.

The following features are supported:

  • EAttributes
  • EIs Root
  • Reference
  • EChildren
  • EParent
  • ERodin Element
  • ERoot

See Also:
  • LightcorePackage.getLightElement()

  • Method Details

    • getEAttributes

      org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EMap<String,Attribute> getEAttributes()
      Returns the value of the 'EAttributes' map. The key is of type String, and the value is of type Attribute,

      If the meaning of the 'EAttributes' map isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'EAttributes' map.
      See Also:
      • LightcorePackage.getLightElement_EAttributes()

    • isEIsRoot

      boolean isEIsRoot()
      Returns the value of the 'EIs Root' attribute.

      If the meaning of the 'EIs Root' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'EIs Root' attribute.
      See Also:
      • setEIsRoot(boolean)
      • LightcorePackage.getLightElement_EIsRoot()

    • setEIsRoot

      void setEIsRoot(boolean value)
      Sets the value of the 'EIs Root' attribute.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value of the 'EIs Root' attribute.
      See Also:
      • isEIsRoot()

    • getReference

      String getReference()
      Returns the value of the 'Reference' attribute. The default value is "".

      If the meaning of the 'Reference' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'Reference' attribute.
      See Also:
      • setReference(String)
      • LightcorePackage.getLightElement_Reference()

    • setReference

      void setReference(String value)
      Sets the value of the 'Reference' attribute.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value of the 'Reference' attribute.
      See Also:
      • getReference()

    • getEChildren

      org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<LightElement> getEChildren()
      Returns the value of the 'EChildren' containment reference list. The list contents are of type LightElement. It is bidirectional and its opposite is 'EParent'.

      If the meaning of the 'EChildren' containment reference list isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'EChildren' containment reference list.
      See Also:
      • LightcorePackage.getLightElement_EChildren()
      • getEParent()

    • getEParent

      LightElement getEParent()
      Returns the value of the 'EParent' container reference. It is bidirectional and its opposite is 'EChildren'.

      If the meaning of the 'EParent' container reference isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'EParent' container reference.
      See Also:
      • setEParent(LightElement)
      • LightcorePackage.getLightElement_EParent()
      • getEChildren()

    • setEParent

      void setEParent(LightElement value)
      Sets the value of the 'EParent' container reference.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value of the 'EParent' container reference.
      See Also:
      • getEParent()

      Object getERodinElement()
      Returns the value of the 'ERodin Element' attribute.

      Returns:
      the value of the 'ERodin Element' attribute.
      See Also:

    • getERoot

      LightElement getERoot()
      Returns the value of the 'ERoot' reference.

      If the meaning of the 'ERoot' reference isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'ERoot' reference.

      void setERoot(LightElement value)

      Parameters:
      value - the new value of the 'ERoot' reference.
      See Also:
      • getERoot()

    • getReferenceWithoutResolving

      String getReferenceWithoutResolving()
      Returns the 'reference' attribute of this element. If this element is a proxy, the reference is obtained from the proxy URI fragment. Otherwise the value of the reference attribute is returned

    • doSetReference

      void doSetReference(String newReference)
      Sets the 'reference' attribute of this element. If this element is a proxy, the reference is seet in the proxy URI fragment. Otherwise the value of the reference attribute is set.

    • addElement

      void addElement(ILElement toAdd, int pos)
      Parameters:
      toAdd -
      pos -
